Linked hydrated refs are included only where they are needed to preserve the classification context.

repair_candidate.summary: Two narrow contributor PRs have repairable non-security paths, but this mixed inventory shard should not open one omnibus fix PR. Split into targeted follow-up fix jobs for #48396/#47120 and #55861/#55850, preserving contributor attribution. #52236/#45082 needs a separate Mattermost design/repair pass before code work. #58367 requires maintainer decision before any fix artifact is executable.

Create separate follow-up fix PRs for #48396/#47120 and #55861/#55850 if maintainers want Clownfish to repair them. Keep #52236/#45082 for a dedicated Mattermost thread-routing pass and route #58367 to maintainer judgment before changing gateway pairing behavior.
